description.content: Quote shipments and list serviceable products
Returns one quote for each shipping product Sendle supports for the given route via query parameters. Supports Duties Unpaid (DAP) international quotes only.

response.name: List of available products with quotes

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Returns one quote per shipping product for the given route. Supports both Duties Unpaid (DAP) and Duties Paid (DDP Price Guaranteed) for international.

response.name: List of available products with quotes

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Legacy quote endpoint. Use GET or POST /products instead.

response.name: Legacy quote

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

Quote shipments and discover serviceable products for a route. Returns one quote
per supported shipping product (Standard vs Express, pickup vs drop off, domestic
vs international Duties Unpaid vs Duties Paid).
